features.title: Maintenance release
features.description: Hardened the analytics heartbeat path with token authentication and per-installation rate limiting. No user-visible UI changes.

features.title: Global file & content search (Ctrl+Shift+F)
features.description: VS Code–style search modal that scans filenames and file contents across the workspace, skips .git / node_modules / target / dist / etc., binary-sniffs files, debounces input, and groups matches by file with line/column previews. Arrow keys navigate, Enter opens the file. Terminal-internal search moved to Ctrl+F so the two no longer collide.

features.title: One-click pull from origin
features.description: New Pull button in the File Changes header pulls the upstream branch (or origin/<current-branch> as fallback) into the current branch with merge strategy.

features.title: Resizable Repositories ⇕ Changes split
features.description: Drag the splitter between the Repositories list and the Changes content inside the File Changes panel — ratio persists across restarts.

features.title: Open a plain shell at any pinned repo
features.description: Each scanned/pinned repo row gets a terminal-icon button that opens an interactive shell (no Claude) at that repo's path. Shells live in a new tabbed BottomTerminalPane with drag-to-resize handle, +/x per tab, and a collapse toggle. Backed by a new create_shell_terminal Rust command (cmd.exe on Windows, $SHELL -li on Unix).

features.title: Focus routing fix for stacked terminals
features.description: Clicking a script-child or bottom-pane terminal no longer bounces focus back to the parent — keystrokes (Ctrl+C included) reach the focused pane reliably.

features.title: File Explorer in the sidebar
features.description: VS Code–style file tree rooted at the active terminal's folder (or the pinned repo in File Changes); drag the horizontal splitter between the terminal list and the Explorer to resize

features.title: Inline Monaco editor tabs
features.description: Click a file in the Explorer or the pencil in File Changes to open it as a tab next to the terminals; per-path models preserve cursor, selection, and undo when switching

features.title: Diff view from File Changes
features.description: Opening a changed file shows a side-by-side HEAD vs working-copy diff; toolbar toggle flips between Diff and Edit modes

features.title: Discard changes per file
features.description: Trash icon on each changed file reverts tracked files to HEAD or deletes untracked files (with confirmation); auto-closes the editor tab

features.title: package.json scripts runner
features.description: Scripts menu in the tab bar plus inline "▶ Run Script" CodeLens when viewing a package.json; selected scripts run in a drag-resizable split terminal below the active one and close with the parent

features.title: Middle-click to close tabs
features.description: Mouse-wheel click closes any tab (terminal or file); dirty files prompt before closing

features.title: Project Tools setting
features.description: Single toggle in Settings shows/hides the Explorer and the package.json scripts runner UI together

features.title: Operate on nested repos from File Changes
features.description: Pin any repo row (root, nested, worktree) to re-target the panel's commit bar, stage/unstage, stash, and inline diffs to that repo — works even when the active terminal's cwd is not a git repo

features.title: Create new branch from the repo dropdown
features.description: New 'Create new branch…' action opens a form with a base-branch select that defaults to master / main / develop when present

features.title: Pull a remote branch into current
features.description: New 'Pull into <current>…' action pre-fills the upstream tracking branch and offers merge / rebase / ff-only strategies; refuses to pull when the working tree is dirty

features.title: Grid Add All button
features.description: Replaced the grid 'Auto' button with 'Add All' so every active terminal can be loaded into the grid in one click

features.title: Branch switcher for nested repos
features.description: Each row in the File Changes > Repositories section now opens an inline branch picker — filter, click a branch, one-click checkout against that specific repo (root, nested sub-repo, or linked worktree)

features.title: Harden drag-and-drop path quoting
features.description: Strip control characters from dropped filenames to block newline-based command injection on macOS/Linux; POSIX paths now use single-quote wrapping to suppress $, backtick, and backslash expansion in bash/zsh, while Windows drive/UNC paths keep cmd/pwsh-safe double quoting

features.title: Drag-and-drop files into terminal
features.description: Drop files or folders from Explorer onto any terminal (tabbed or grid) — paths are quoted and pasted at the cursor

features.title: Git panel in File Changes
features.description: Repositories section lists the root repo, linked worktrees, and nested sub-repos (with branch, dirty flag, ahead/behind counts)

features.title: Branch switcher in the titlebar
features.description: The branch pill is now an interactive dropdown — filter, pick a branch, one-click checkout with error toasts on dirty trees

features.title: Per-file stage, unstage, and commit
features.description: Separate Staged / Changes sections with per-file + and − buttons, bulk Stage all / Unstage all, and stage-aware Commit / Commit & Push

features.title: Stash, pop, and apply from the UI
features.description: Stash working changes, and manage existing stashes with Apply (keep) / Pop / Drop actions

features.title: Reorder terminal tabs by drag
features.description: Drag tabs in the tab bar to change their order — reorder persists in the terminal store

features.title: Readable toasts
features.description: Fixed transparent toast background — cards are now fully opaque with a coloured status ring, left accent bar, and top-most z-index

features.title: Security hardening
features.description: Tightened path-containment validation, reordered updater endpoints so signed GitHub releases are queried first, added size caps on settings and log reads, patched rollup/picomatch advisories

features.title: GPU-accelerated terminal rendering
features.description: xterm WebGL renderer with graceful DOM fallback on context loss, scrollback capped at 5000 lines

features.title: Smoother multi-terminal output
features.description: Fixed store-selector churn that tore down terminals on unrelated updates and short-circuited duplicate unread-set updates under streaming load

features.title: Higher PTY throughput
features.description: Larger read buffer (8KB to 32KB), 10x larger IPC channel, and buffered log writes

features.title: Optimized release build
features.description: Rust release profile now compiled with opt-level=3 + LTO + codegen-units=1 for runtime speed over binary size

features.title: Fix analytics worker URL
features.description: Corrected telemetry endpoint for usage tracking

features.title: Active user telemetry
features.description: Anonymous heartbeat every 5 minutes to track active users (opt-out in Settings)

features.title: Minor UI cleanup
features.description: Removed unused sidebar state from titlebar component

features.title: Duplicate Terminal
features.description: Clone the active terminal's config (working directory, args, env vars, color tag, nickname) via Ctrl+Shift+D or the copy icon on tab hover

features.title: App logo in titlebar
features.description: Replaced the sidebar toggle icon with the ClaudeTerminal app logo

features.title: Manage Profiles icon
features.description: Added UserCog icon to the Manage Profiles sidebar button for consistency

features.title: IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1 inspired UI refresh
features.description: New dark neutral palette, IntelliJ-blue accent, compact toolbar with project/branch breadcrumb, and underline-style terminal tabs

features.title: Redesigned sidebar as a tool window
features.description: Uppercase section header, 2px accent selection stripe, and softer in-panel dividers

features.title: Compact status bar
features.description: 22px dense layout with grouped widgets matching IntelliJ's status line

features.title: Refined empty state
features.description: Platform-aware keyboard shortcut hint (Ctrl+Shift+N on Windows, ⌘⇧N on macOS)

features.title: Toast Notifications
features.description: In-app toast notifications for profile, workspace, snippet, and terminal operations with animated progress bars and auto-dismiss

features.title: Terminal Focus Fix
features.description: Fixed keyboard becoming unresponsive after mouse click or PTY output in WebView2

features.title: Inline Diff Viewer
features.description: Click any changed file in the File Changes panel to see its diff inline with syntax-colored additions, removals, and line numbers

features.title: URL Validation Hardening
features.description: External URL opening now uses proper URL parsing to prevent scheme confusion and null byte bypass attacks

features.title: Worktree Path Authorization
features.description: Git worktree and branch commands now validate that paths belong to active terminal sessions, preventing unauthorized filesystem access

features.title: Elevation Design System
features.description: New 5-level surface hierarchy with refined color tokens, desaturated accents, and glow shadows for improved visual depth

features.title: App Status Bar
features.description: Persistent bottom bar showing terminal count, active status, model indicator, notification toggle, Claude version, and app version

features.title: Enhanced Command Palette
features.description: Prefix filtering (> commands, @ terminals, # snippets), icons, keyboard shortcut badges, ranked fuzzy search, and smooth animations

features.title: Collapsible Sidebar
features.description: Sidebar now collapses to a 48px icon rail with terminal status dots, unread indicators, and quick-action buttons

features.title: Tab Scroll Indicators
features.description: Gradient fade arrows appear when tabs overflow, with hidden scrollbar for a cleaner look

features.title: Modal Backdrop Blur
features.description: All modals now use a subtle backdrop blur effect for improved visual layering

features.title: Fix Terminal Keyboard Input
features.description: Terminals now auto-focus on creation so keyboard input works immediately — fixes issue where Enter, Esc, arrow keys, and number keys were unresponsive on first-time trust prompts

features.title: Git Worktree Support
features.description: Manage git worktrees directly from the app with a dedicated modal (Ctrl+Shift+W), inline creation in New Terminal, and branch/worktree badges in sidebar and tabs

features.title: Terminal Status Bar
features.description: Persistent bar at the bottom of each terminal showing session duration, model/effort badges, working directory, and quick actions

features.title: Drag & Drop Terminal Management
features.description: Drag terminals from sidebar into grid cells, swap grid cells, and drop onto tabs for split view

features.title: Fix URL Click
features.description: Clicking URLs in terminal output now correctly opens them in your system browser

features.title: Responsive New Terminal Modal
features.description: Modal now scrolls on smaller screens (FHD) so the Create button is always accessible

features.title: ECC Tools Integration
features.description: Added repository skills, workflow command scaffolds, and Codex agent configurations for enhanced AI-assisted development

features.title: Agent Teams Mission Control
features.description: Enhanced orchestration panel (F4) with live task board showing status, owners, and blocked dependencies

features.title: Session Timeline & Resume Hub
features.description: New F7 modal with visual timeline of past sessions and one-click resume via --continue

features.title: Loop Mode Dashboard
features.description: Auto-detect loop mode from terminal output with pulsing badges on tabs and sidebar

features.title: Worktree-Aware Terminal Spawning
features.description: Toggle in New Terminal modal to run sessions in isolated git worktrees

features.title: Model & Effort Switcher
features.description: Per-terminal model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) and effort (Low/Medium/High) selectors with color-coded badges

features.title: Teleport & Remote Control
features.description: Quick-action buttons on running terminals for /teleport and /remote-control commands

features.title: Smart Terminal Insights
features.description: Auto-summarize sessions via Claude Haiku when terminals stop, with summary card display

features.title: CLAUDE.md & Memory Editor
features.description: New F8 modal for editing CLAUDE.md files, auto-memory files, and rules

features.title: Fixed application freezing and crashing
features.description: Resolved a deadlock caused by synchronous thread joins on terminal close that blocked the entire UI on Windows

features.title: Fixed exit handler deadlock
features.description: App shutdown no longer hangs when closing terminals with active PTY readers

features.title: Improved mutex safety
features.description: Added timeout protection for lock acquisition in terminal output processing

features.title: Fixed thread/resource leak
features.description: Reader threads are now properly tracked and joined on terminal close

features.title: Fixed terminal status tracking
features.description: Terminal status now correctly updates to Stopped when process exits

features.title: Fixed silent error suppression
features.description: Database errors are now logged instead of silently discarded

features.title: Fixed shutdown race condition
features.description: Session save and terminal cleanup now happen atomically

features.title: Fixed unmounted component callbacks
features.description: Prevented state updates on unmounted React components

features.title: Added error handling to ProfileModal
features.description: Save/delete operations now show errors in the UI

features.title: Fixed missing React effect dependencies
features.description: What's New modal and profile form now properly react to changes

features.title: Session Output Restoration
features.description: Restored terminals now show previous session output with visual separators, so you can pick up right where you left off

features.title: Claude Config Manager (F6)
features.description: Manage global Claude Code configuration from within the app — edit settings.json, create/edit/delete agents and custom commands

features.title: Settings tab
features.description: JSON editor for ~/.claude/settings.json with syntax highlighting

features.title: Agents tab
features.description: Create, edit, and delete agent files in ~/.claude/agents/

features.title: Commands tab
features.description: Create, edit, and delete custom command files in ~/.claude/commands/

features.title: macOS Support
features.description: Full macOS compatibility with native shell integration

features.title: Security Hardening
features.description: Shell injection prevention, expanded input validation, and credential leak fixes

features.title: Fix Ctrl+V paste reliability
features.description: Replaced async Clipboard API with native browser paste to fix silent failures due to focus/permission issues

features.title: Fix Ctrl+Z in terminal
features.description: Added explicit handling for Ctrl+Z which was being intercepted by the browser as undo instead of sending to the PTY

features.title: Agent Teams Panel (F4)
features.description: Monitor Claude Code multi-agent team sessions with real-time team structure, member details, and task counts

features.title: What's New Modal
features.description: See release notes after each update, including skipped versions

features.title: Command Palette (F1)
features.description: Quick access to all actions via a searchable command palette

features.title: Output Logging
features.description: Automatically log terminal output to files for later review

features.title: Crash Recovery (F3)
features.description: Restore your previous session after an unexpected shutdown

features.title: Split Pane (F4)
features.description: View two terminals side by side with adjustable split ratio

features.title: Snippets (F5)
features.description: Save and quickly insert reusable text snippets into terminals

features.title: Session History (F2)
features.description: Browse and search your past terminal sessions

features.title: Workspace Save/Load
features.description: Save and restore complete workspace configurations

features.title: Screenshot updates
features.description: Updated README screenshots with current app views

features.title: File Changes Panel
features.description: Per-terminal git status panel showing changed files

features.title: UI refinements
features.description: Dynamic version display and backend improvements

features.title: Claude Code Agents
features.description: Manage Claude Code agents directly from the app

features.title: Commands & Settings
features.description: New commands and settings management features

features.title: Configuration Profiles
features.description: Create and switch between saved terminal configurations

features.title: In-app Auto-updater
features.description: Automatic update detection and installation

features.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Global keyboard shortcuts for common actions
